tagline: Validate your startup ideas with AI

landing.heroTitle: Turn your startup idea into validated opportunity
landing.heroSubtitle: Get instant, multi-model AI analysis. Know the pros, cons, risks and next steps before you build.
landing.step1Desc: Write a clear description of your startup concept
landing.step2Desc: Quick single-model scan or deep Forge multi-model research
landing.step3Desc: Score, pros/cons, audience, monetization, risks & actionable next steps

modes.quickDesc: Fast analysis using one powerful LLM. Great for initial screening.
modes.forgeDesc: Cross-validated by multiple models. Deep insights. Recommended for serious founders.

landing.footer: Built with ❤️ for founders who validate before they build.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to start validating ideas
auth.signupSubtitle: Join Idea Forge and validate your next big idea

dashboard.title: Validate your idea
dashboard.subtitle: Describe your startup idea in detail for the best results
dashboard.ideaPlaceholder: e.g. A platform that uses AI to automatically generate and A/B test landing page copy for SaaS startups, integrated with analytics...
dashboard.forgeNote: Forge mode uses asynchronous job queue and may take 30-60 seconds. Requires active subscription.
dashboard.noReports: No reports yet. Validate your first idea above!

jobs.timeoutWarning: Analysis is taking longer than expected. Please wait or try Quick mode.

error.timeout: Request timed out. Please try again or use Quick mode.
error.empty: Received empty response from AI. Please try again.

pricing.title: Simple pricing for serious founders
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade for deep Forge research and unlimited validations.
